title: Build Smart Farmer Guide progressive web app

requirements.text: Create a splash screen displaying the app logo and app name 'Smart Farmer Guide' with a smooth transition to the home screen after 2 seconds

quotes: Splash Screen - App logo - App name: 'Smart Farmer Guide'

acceptanceCriteria: Splash screen displays app logo centered on screen
App name 'Smart Farmer Guide' is visible below logo
Automatically transitions to home screen after 2 seconds
Uses green/earthy color theme

requirements.text: Create a home dashboard screen with a grid layout of 6 large, icon-based navigation cards: Crop Schedule, Fertilizer Calculator, Pest & Disease, Weather Advisory, Market Prices, and Government Schemes. Each card must have large, clear icons and text suitable for first-time smartphone users.

quotes: Home Screen (Dashboard) - Grid of 6 large cards: Crop Schedule, Fertilizer Calculator, Pest & Disease, Weather Advisory, Market Prices, Government Schemes

acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard displays 6 cards in a 2-column grid on mobile
Each card has a large, clear icon representing its function
Card text uses large fonts suitable for rural users
Cards are touch-friendly with adequate spacing
Navigation to each feature screen works on card tap

requirements.text: Create a Crop Schedule screen with a dropdown to select crop (Cotton, Soybean, Wheat, Rice) and display a step-by-step timeline showing sowing, fertilizer stages, irrigation, and harvest phases for the selected crop using cards or timeline UI

quotes: Crop Schedule Screen - Select crop (Cotton, Soybean, Wheat, Rice) - Show step-by-step timeline: Sowing, Fertilizer stages, Irrigation, Harvest

acceptanceCriteria: Dropdown selector displays all 4 crop options with large, readable text
Timeline displays sequentially for selected crop
Each stage shows timing and key actions in farmer-friendly language
Visual timeline or card layout makes the sequence clear
All static data for 4 crops is included in the code

requirements.text: Create a Fertilizer Dose Calculator screen with input fields for crop name (dropdown) and land area in acres (number input), and calculate fertilizer quantities (Urea, DAP, etc.) using local logic. Display results instantly below the inputs.

quotes: Fertilizer Dose Calculator Screen - Inputs: Crop name, Land area (in acres) - Output: Fertilizer name (Urea, DAP, etc.), Quantity calculation using local logic

acceptanceCriteria: Dropdown shows crop options with large text
Number input for land area accepts decimal values
Calculate button triggers instant calculation
Results display fertilizer types and quantities clearly
Calculation logic is embedded in frontend code
Results update immediately without any backend calls

requirements.text: Create a Pest & Disease Management screen showing crop-wise lists of common pests and diseases. Each entry must display pest/disease name, symptoms, control method, and chemical name with dosage. Use placeholder images and simple, farmer-friendly text.

quotes: Pest & Disease Management Screen - Crop-wise pest and disease list - Each item shows: Pest/Disease name, Symptoms, Control method, Chemical name and dosage

acceptanceCriteria: Crop selector shows all 4 crops
List displays relevant pests/diseases for selected crop
Each entry shows name, symptoms, control method, and chemical dosage
Placeholder images are used for each pest/disease
Text is simple and suitable for rural farmers
All data is static and embedded in the frontend

requirements.text: Create a Weather Advisory screen with simulated weather options (Sunny, Rainy, Cloudy) that can be selected by the user, and display farming advisory messages based on the selected condition (e.g., 'Do not spray during rain', 'Irrigation recommended')

quotes: Weather Advisory Screen - No API required - Simulated weather options: Sunny / Rainy / Cloudy - Show advisory messages: 'Do not spray during rain', 'Irrigation recommended'

acceptanceCriteria: Three large buttons or cards for Sunny, Rainy, Cloudy selection
Advisory messages display immediately upon weather selection
Messages provide practical farming advice for each weather condition
No external API calls are made
All advisory content is static and embedded

requirements.text: Create a Market Prices screen displaying a static list of crop prices in APMC style format showing crop name and price per quintal. Make the data easy to update by storing it in a simple, well-documented format.

quotes: Market Prices Screen - Static crop price list (APMC style) - Crop name and price per quintal - Easy to update locally

acceptanceCriteria: Table or list displays crop names and prices per quintal
Price data is stored in a clear, easily editable format
Display is optimized for mobile viewing
Supports at least 10 common crops
Includes clear code comments for updating prices

requirements.text: Create a Government Schemes screen listing major schemes (crop insurance, fertilizer subsidy, irrigation subsidy) with details about eligibility criteria and benefits for each scheme

quotes: Government Schemes Screen - Major schemes list: Crop insurance, Fertilizer subsidy, Irrigation subsidy - Show eligibility and benefits

acceptanceCriteria: List displays at least 3 major government schemes
Each scheme shows name, eligibility criteria, and benefits
Content is in simple, farmer-friendly language
Layout uses large fonts and clear cards
All scheme data is static and embedded

requirements.text: Implement a mobile-first responsive design with green and earthy color theme throughout the app. Use large buttons, large fonts, icon-based navigation, and ensure the layout is extremely simple and suitable for first-time smartphone users on low-end Android devices.

quotes: Mobile-first Android UI - Very simple layout - Large buttons and fonts - Green / earthy color theme - Icon-based navigation - Easy for first-time smartphone users

acceptanceCriteria: All screens are fully responsive on mobile devices
Primary color palette uses green and earthy tones
Buttons are large and touch-friendly (minimum 48x48px touch targets)
Font sizes are large throughout (minimum 16px body, 24px+ headings)
Navigation uses clear icons with labels
Layout is simple with minimal complexity
App performs well on low-end Android devices through browser

requirements.text: Structure the codebase to support easy future translation to Hindi and Marathi by isolating all user-facing text strings in a centralized location with clear comments indicating translation points

quotes: Support future translation to Hindi / Marathi

acceptanceCriteria: All user-facing text is stored in a centralized constants or i18n-ready file
Code comments clearly indicate translation points
Text strings are organized by screen/feature
No hardcoded strings in component JSX
Documentation explains how to add new languages

requirements.text: Implement progressive web app (PWA) functionality with a service worker to enable offline access to all static data including crop schedules, fertilizer calculations, pest management information, weather advisories, market prices, and government schemes

quotes: The app must work fully offline for static data

acceptanceCriteria: Service worker caches all static assets and data
App loads and functions without internet connection after first visit
All 6 feature screens work offline
PWA manifest allows installation to home screen
App remains functional on low-connectivity networks

requirements.text: Apply a creative, cohesive visual design theme with an earthy, agricultural aesthetic that uses greens, browns, and warm earth tones. The design should feel trustworthy and approachable for rural farmers, with nature-inspired elements that reinforce the farming context throughout the interface.
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette consistently uses greens, browns, and earth tones
Visual style feels agricultural and nature-inspired
Design elements are simple and trustworthy
Typography is clear and highly legible
Icons and imagery relate to farming context
Overall aesthetic is cohesive across all screens

constraints: Must be a progressive web app, not a native Flutter/Android application
Must work fully offline for all static data after initial load
No backend API calls for core functionality
No user authentication or login system required
All data must be static and embedded in the frontend code
Must perform well on low-end Android devices through mobile browsers
Must not use any paid third-party APIs
nonGoals: Native Android app development with Flutter
Live market price updates from external sources
User accounts or personalized data storage
Backend database for storing user data
Multi-language support in initial version (only structure for future translation)
Play Store deployment (PWA installation from browser instead)

required: App logo for Smart Farmer Guide with farming/agricultural theme, green tones (logo.dim_512x512.png)
Large icon for Crop Schedule feature showing calendar or planting imagery (icon-crop-schedule.dim_128x128.png)
Large icon for Fertilizer Calculator showing fertilizer bag or chemical symbol (icon-fertilizer.dim_128x128.png)
Large icon for Pest & Disease showing insect or plant disease imagery (icon-pest-disease.dim_128x128.png)
Large icon for Weather Advisory showing sun, cloud, or rain symbols (icon-weather.dim_128x128.png)
Large icon for Market Prices showing rupee symbol or market stand (icon-market-prices.dim_128x128.png)
Large icon for Government Schemes showing government building or document (icon-gov-schemes.dim_128x128.png)
Placeholder image for cotton pest example (pest-cotton.dim_256x256.png)
Placeholder image for soybean disease example (disease-soybean.dim_256x256.png)
Placeholder image for wheat pest example (pest-wheat.dim_256x256.png)
Placeholder image for rice disease example (disease-rice.dim_256x256.png)
